description_long: This bungalow features a modern, minimalist design with a large, flat, rust-colored metal roof that extends well beyond the building's footprint, providing ample shade and a striking visual profile. The structure sits on a solid concrete base, with a wooden deck area visible on two sides, suggesting outdoor living space. One side of the bungalow displays a stack of firewood and a partially enclosed entryway, while the opposite side reveals a small bench and a sheltered porch area. Large glass sliding doors and windows are present on the main facade, allowing for natural light and a connection to the outdoors. A single, prominent chimney rises from the center of the roof, indicating the presence of a fireplace or stove inside. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, with clean lines, a mix of industrial and natural materials, and a focus on functional outdoor-indoor living.
description: A modern bungalow with a wide, flat rust-colored roof, concrete base, wood deck, large glass windows, and a central chimney. The design emphasizes clean lines and a blend of industrial and natural materials.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main glass entrance, extended roof, and wood deck.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the firewood stack, entry alcove, and concrete base.
description_view_2: Rear view with a solid concrete wall and minimal window openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a small bench, porch area, and wood deck.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front-facing glass panels
